name: csv to Hive loader
command:
docker exec -i hiveserver2 beeline -u 'jdbc:hive2://localhost:10000/' -e "CREATE TABLE IF NOT exists test2 (    col1 Int,  col2 int,  col3 int, col4 bigint, col5 float, col6 float, col7 boolean, col8 STRING, col9 TIMESTAMP, col10 float, col11 STRING) ROW FORMAT DELIMITED 
FIELDS TERMINATED BY '|'
STORED AS TEXTFILE;LOAD DATA LOCAL INPATH '${file}' INTO TABLE ${table}; INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE ${table2} SELECT * FROM ${table} WHERE col7;"
